# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

class AdminDashboard
{
    private PDO $pdo;

    public function __construct(string $host, string $dbname, string $username, string $password)
    {
        $dsn = "mysql:host={$host};dbname={$dbname};charset=utf8mb4";
        $this->pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password, [
            PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
            PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
            PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize and validate filter inputs from $_POST
     */
    private function sanitizeFilters(array $postData): array
    {
        $filters = [];

        // Date range filters
        if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
            $dateFrom = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($postData['date_from']));
            if ($dateFrom !== '1970-01-01') {
                $filters['date_from'] = $dateFrom;
            }
        }

        if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
            $dateTo = date('Y-m-d', strtotime($postData['date_to']));
            if ($dateTo !== '1970-01-01') {
                $filters['date_to'] = $dateTo;
            }
        }

        // Status filter (single or multiple)
        if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
            if (is_array($postData['status'])) {
                $filters['status'] = array_map(function ($s) {
                    return htmlspecialchars(trim($s), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                }, $postData['status']);
                $filters['status'] = array_filter($filters['status']);
            } else {
                $sanitized = htmlspecialchars(trim($postData['status']), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
                if ($sanitized !== '') {
                    $filters['status'] = [$sanitized];
                }
            }
        }

        // Category filter (single or multiple)
        if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
            if (is_array($postData['category'])) {
                $filters['category'] = array_map('intval', $postData['category']);
                $filters['category'] = array_filter($filters['category'], function ($v) {
                    return $v > 0;
                });
            } else {
                $catId = intval($postData['category']);
                if ($catId > 0) {
                    $filters['category'] = [$catId];
                }
            }
        }

        // Search keyword
        if (!empty($postData['search'])) {
            $search = trim($postData['search']);
            if (strlen($search) >= 2) {
                $filters['search'] = $search;
            }
        }

        // Sorting
        $allowedSortColumns = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'title', 'status', 'category_name', 'total_amount'];
        if (!empty($postData['sort_by']) && in_array($postData['sort_by'], $allowedSortColumns, true)) {
            $filters['sort_by'] = $postData['sort_by'];
        }

        $allowedSortDirections = ['ASC', 'DESC'];
        if (!empty($postData['sort_dir']) && in_array(strtoupper($postData['sort_dir']), $allowedSortDirections, true)) {
            $filters['sort_dir'] = strtoupper($postData['sort_dir']);
        }

        // Pagination
        if (isset($postData['page'])) {
            $filters['page'] = max(1, intval($postData['page']));
        }

        if (isset($postData['per_page'])) {
            $filters['per_page'] = min(500, max(1, intval($postData['per_page'])));
        }

        // Report type
        $allowedReportTypes = ['orders', 'users', 'products', 'revenue', 'summary'];
        if (!empty($postData['report_type']) && in_array($postData['report_type'], $allowedReportTypes, true)) {
            $filters['report_type'] = $postData['report_type'];
        }

        // Group by period for summary reports
        $allowedGroupBy = ['day', 'week', 'month', 'year'];
        if (!empty($postData['group_by']) && in_array($postData['group_by'], $allowedGroupBy, true)) {
            $filters['group_by'] = $postData['group_by'];
        }

        return $filters;
    }

    /**
     * Generate report based on filters
     */
    public function generateReport(array $postData): array
    {
        $filters = $this->sanitizeFilters($postData);
        $reportType = $filters['report_type'] ?? 'orders';

        switch ($reportType) {
            case 'orders':
                return $this->getOrdersReport($filters);
            case 'users':
                return $this->getUsersReport($filters);
            case 'products':
                return $this->getProductsReport($filters);
            case 'revenue':
                return $this->getRevenueReport($filters);
            case 'summary':
                return $this->getSummaryReport($filters);
            default:
                return ['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid report type'];
        }
    }

    /**
     * Build WHERE clause dynamically from filters
     */
    private function buildWhereClause(array $filters, string $dateColumn = 'o.created_at', string $tableAlias = 'o'): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        // Date range
        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $conditions[] = "{$dateColumn} >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $conditions[] = "{$dateColumn} <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
        }

        // Status filter (IN clause with multiple values)
        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_{$index}";
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "{$tableAlias}.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        }

        // Category filter (IN clause with multiple values)
        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $catId) {
                $placeholder = ":category_{$index}";
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $catId;
            }
            $conditions[] = "{$tableAlias}.category_id IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        }

        // Search keyword
        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $conditions[] = "({$tableAlias}.title LIKE :search OR {$tableAlias}.description LIKE :search)";
            $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
        }

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        return ['clause' => $whereClause, 'params' => $params];
    }

    /**
     * Build ORDER BY clause
     */
    private function buildOrderByClause(array $filters, string $defaultColumn = 'created_at'): string
    {
        $sortBy = $filters['sort_by'] ?? $defaultColumn;
        $sortDir = $filters['sort_dir'] ?? 'DESC';
        return " ORDER BY {$sortBy} {$sortDir}";
    }

    /**
     * Build LIMIT clause for pagination
     */
    private function buildLimitClause(array $filters): array
    {
        $page = $filters['page'] ?? 1;
        $perPage = $filters['per_page'] ?? 25;
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $perPage;

        return [
            'clause' => " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset",
            'params' => [':limit' => $perPage, ':offset' => $offset],
            'page' => $page,
            'per_page' => $perPage,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Execute a count query to get total results
     */
    private function getTotal(string $countSql, array $params): int
    {
        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($countSql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        return (int) $stmt->fetchColumn();
    }

    /**
     * Orders report
     */
    private function getOrdersReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $where = $this->buildWhereClause($filters, 'o.created_at', 'o');
        $orderBy = $this->buildOrderByClause($filters, 'o.created_at');
        $limit = $this->buildLimitClause($filters);

        // Count query
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) 
                      FROM orders o 
                      LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause'];

        $total = $this->getTotal($countSql, $where['params']);

        // Data query
        $sql = "SELECT 
                    o.id AS order_id,
                    o.title,
                    o.description,
                    o.status,
                    o.total_amount,
                    o.created_at,
                    o.updated_at,
                    c.name AS category_name,
                    u.name AS user_name,
                    u.email AS user_email
                FROM orders o
                LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . $orderBy
            . $limit['clause'];

        $allParams = array_merge($where['params'], $limit['params']);

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($allParams as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Aggregates
        $aggSql = "SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                        COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value,
                        COALESCE(MIN(o.total_amount), 0) AS min_order_value,
                        COALESCE(MAX(o.total_amount), 0) AS max_order_value
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause'];

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($aggSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $aggregates = $stmt->fetch();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'orders',
            'data' => $data,
            'aggregates' => $aggregates,
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => $total,
                'page' => $limit['page'],
                'per_page' => $limit['per_page'],
                'total_pages' => ceil($total / $limit['per_page']),
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Users report
     */
    private function getUsersReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $conditions[] = "u.created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $conditions[] = "u.created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_{$index}";
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "u.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        }

        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $conditions[] = "(u.name LIKE :search OR u.email LIKE :search)";
            $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
        }

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        $orderBy = $this->buildOrderByClause($filters, 'u.created_at');
        $limit = $this->buildLimitClause($filters);

        // Count
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u" . $whereClause;
        $total = $this->getTotal($countSql, $params);

        // Data
        $sql = "SELECT 
                    u.id AS user_id,
                    u.name,
                    u.email,
                    u.status,
                    u.created_at,
                    COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                    COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_spent,
                    COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value
                FROM users u
                LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id"
            . $whereClause
            . " GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email, u.status, u.created_at"
            . $orderBy
            . $limit['clause'];

        $allParams = array_merge($params, $limit['params']);

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($allParams as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Aggregates
        $aggSql = "SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS total_users,
                        SUM(CASE WHEN u.status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_users,
                        SUM(CASE WHEN u.status = 'inactive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_users
                    FROM users u" . $whereClause;

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($aggSql);
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $aggregates = $stmt->fetch();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'users',
            'data' => $data,
            'aggregates' => $aggregates,
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => $total,
                'page' => $limit['page'],
                'per_page' => $limit['per_page'],
                'total_pages' => ceil($total / $limit['per_page']),
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Products report
     */
    private function getProductsReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $conditions = [];
        $params = [];

        if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
            $conditions[] = "p.created_at >= :date_from";
            $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
            $conditions[] = "p.created_at <= :date_to";
            $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
        }

        if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_{$index}";
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "p.status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        }

        if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $catId) {
                $placeholder = ":category_{$index}";
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $catId;
            }
            $conditions[] = "p.category_id IN (" . implode(', ', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        }

        if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
            $conditions[] = "(p.title LIKE :search OR p.description LIKE :search)";
            $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
        }

        $whereClause = '';
        if (!empty($conditions)) {
            $whereClause = ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
        }

        $orderBy = $this->buildOrderByClause($filters, 'total_sold');
        $limit = $this->buildLimitClause($filters);

        // Count
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) 
                      FROM products p 
                      LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id"
            . $whereClause;
        $total = $this->getTotal($countSql, $params);

        // Data
        $sql = "SELECT 
                    p.id AS product_id,
                    p.title,
                    p.description,
                    p.price,
                    p.status,
                    p.created_at,
                    c.name AS category_name,
                    COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS total_sold,
                    COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 0) AS total_revenue
                FROM products p
                LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id
                LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_id"
            . $whereClause
            . " GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.status, p.created_at, c.name"
            . $orderBy
            . $limit['clause'];

        $allParams = array_merge($params, $limit['params']);

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($allParams as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'products',
            'data' => $data,
            'pagination' => [
                'total' => $total,
                'page' => $limit['page'],
                'per_page' => $limit['per_page'],
                'total_pages' => ceil($total / $limit['per_page']),
            ],
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Revenue report with grouping by time period
     */
    private function getRevenueReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $where = $this->buildWhereClause($filters, 'o.created_at', 'o');
        $groupBy = $filters['group_by'] ?? 'day';

        switch ($groupBy) {
            case 'year':
                $dateFormat = "DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y')";
                $dateLabel = 'year';
                break;
            case 'month':
                $dateFormat = "DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m')";
                $dateLabel = 'month';
                break;
            case 'week':
                $dateFormat = "DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%x-W%v')";
                $dateLabel = 'week';
                break;
            case 'day':
            default:
                $dateFormat = "DATE(o.created_at)";
                $dateLabel = 'date';
                break;
        }

        $sql = "SELECT 
                    {$dateFormat} AS period,
                    COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                    COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers,
                    COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                    COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value,
                    COALESCE(MIN(o.total_amount), 0) AS min_order_value,
                    COALESCE(MAX(o.total_amount), 0) AS max_order_value
                FROM orders o
                LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY period"
            . " ORDER BY period ASC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($sql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Overall aggregates
        $aggSql = "SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                        COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause'];

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($aggSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $aggregates = $stmt->fetch();

        // Revenue by category
        $catSql = "SELECT 
                        c.name AS category_name,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY c.id, c.name"
            . " ORDER BY total_revenue DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($catSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $byCategory = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Revenue by status
        $statusSql = "SELECT 
                            o.status,
                            COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                            COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue
                        FROM orders o
                        LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY o.status"
            . " ORDER BY total_revenue DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($statusSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $byStatus = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'revenue',
            'group_by' => $groupBy,
            'data' => $data,
            'aggregates' => $aggregates,
            'by_category' => $byCategory,
            'by_status' => $byStatus,
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Summary dashboard report
     */
    private function getSummaryReport(array $filters): array
    {
        $where = $this->buildWhereClause($filters, 'o.created_at', 'o');

        // Order summary
        $orderSql = "SELECT 
                        COUNT(*) AS total_orders,
                        COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS unique_customers,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue,
                        COALESCE(AVG(o.total_amount), 0) AS avg_order_value
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause'];

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($orderSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $orderSummary = $stmt->fetch();

        // Status breakdown
        $statusSql = "SELECT 
                        o.status,
                        COUNT(*) AS count,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY o.status ORDER BY count DESC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($statusSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $statusBreakdown = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Top categories
        $catSql = "SELECT 
                        c.name AS category_name,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_revenue
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 10";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($catSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $topCategories = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Top customers
        $custSql = "SELECT 
                        u.id AS user_id,
                        u.name,
                        u.email,
                        COUNT(o.id) AS total_orders,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS total_spent
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 10";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($custSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $topCustomers = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Recent orders
        $recentSql = "SELECT 
                        o.id AS order_id,
                        o.title,
                        o.status,
                        o.total_amount,
                        o.created_at,
                        u.name AS user_name,
                        c.name AS category_name
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id
                    LEFT JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 10";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($recentSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $recentOrders = $stmt->fetchAll();

        // Daily trend (last 30 days or within date range)
        $trendSql = "SELECT 
                        DATE(o.created_at) AS date,
                        COUNT(*) AS orders,
                        COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS revenue
                    FROM orders o
                    LEFT JOIN categories c ON o.category_id = c.id"
            . $where['clause']
            . " GROUP BY DATE(o.created_at) ORDER BY date ASC";

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($trendSql);
        foreach ($where['params'] as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, is_int($value) ? PDO::PARAM_INT : PDO::PARAM_STR);
        }
        $stmt->execute();
        $dailyTrend = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'success' => true,
            'report_type' => 'summary',
            'order_summary' => $orderSummary,
            'status_breakdown' => $statusBreakdown,
            'top_categories' => $topCategories,
            'top_customers' => $topCustomers,
            'recent_orders' => $recentOrders,
            'daily_trend' => $dailyTrend,
            'filters_applied' => $filters,
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Get available filter options for the dashboard UI
     */
    public function getFilterOptions(): array
    {
        // Available statuses
        $stmt = $this->pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders ORDER BY status");
        $statuses = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);

        // Available categories
        $stmt = $this->pdo->query("SELECT id, name FROM categories ORDER BY name");
        $categories = $stmt->fetchAll();

        return [
            'statuses' => $statuses,
            'categories' => $categories,
            'report_types' => ['orders', 'users', 'products', 'revenue', 'summary'],
            'group_by_options' => ['day', 'week', 'month', 'year'],
            'sort_columns' => ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'title', 'status', 'category_name', 'total_amount'],
            'sort_directions' => ['ASC', 'DESC'],
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Export report data to CSV
     */
    public function exportToCsv(array $postData): void
    {
        $report = $this->generateReport($postData);

        if (!$report['success']) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to generate report for export.');
        }

        $reportType = $report['report_type'] ?? 'report';
        $filename = "{$reportType}_report_" . date('Y-m-d_His') . '.csv';

        header('Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8');
        header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $filename . '"');

        $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');

        $data = $report['data'] ?? [];

        if (!empty($data)) {
            // Write header row
            fputcsv($output, array_keys($data[0]));

            // Write data rows
            foreach ($data as $row) {
                fputcsv($output, $row);
            }
        }

        fclose($output);
    }
}

// --- Usage / Entry Point ---

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' || php_sapi_name() === 'cli') {
    try {
        $dashboard = new AdminDashboard(
            host: 'localhost',
            dbname: 'admin_db',
            username: 'root',
            password: ''
        );

        $action = $_POST['action'] ?? 'report';

        switch ($action) {
            case 'export':
                $dashboard->exportToCsv($_POST);
                exit;

            case 'filters':
                $result = $dashboard->getFilterOptions();
                break;

            case 'report':
            default:
                $result = $dashboard->generateReport($_POST);
                break;
        }

        header('Content-Type: application/json');
        echo json_encode($result, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);

    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        http_response_code(500);
        header('Content-Type: application/json');
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => 'Database error: ' . $e->getMessage(),
        ]);
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        http_response_code(500);
        header('Content-Type: application/json');
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage(),
        ]);
    }
}
